title: Community
headline: VT Vibe Coding Club
searchDescription: Building an inclusive student community for AI-assisted development, hands-on workshops, collaborative builds, and Vibe-a-thons at Virginia Tech.
longDescription: VT Vibe Coding Club creates an ongoing space for students to explore programming, AI-assisted development, and emerging software tools beyond what traditional coursework usually covers. The club focuses on hands-on workshops, collaborative build sessions, and multi-day Vibe-a-thons that mirror how modern software is actually developed in industry. It also gives students a place to discuss best practices, limitations, and ethical considerations around AI tools while building stronger technical foundations through peer-driven learning.

title: Community
headline: Virginia Tech Competitive Robotics Organization
searchDescription: Virginia Tech's largest design team, building robotics through small, dedicated teams across multiple labs and projects.

mediaFrames.alt: Virginia Tech Competitive Robotics Organization group picture
mediaFrames.caption: VT CRO Group Picture | Last Year with our Founder Marco

title: Brave & Love
headline: Life Far From My Homeland
searchDescription: There is always a second place that feels like home, I gotta adapt to a complete new world, outside of the bubble I was comforted inside.
longDescription: Moving far from home changed how I think about identity, resilience, and belonging. It made me sharper, but also more grounded.

title: Confidence
headline: TEDx Speech: A Wary but Positive Look at AI
searchDescription: From a sitting duck to a motivational speaker, I aim to ignite hearts and minds, encouraging everyone to pursue their happinesses in life.
longDescription: Giving a TEDx talk taught me how to turn uncertainty into voice. It was one of the first moments where I felt comfortable translating big technical ideas into something human and memorable.

title: Growth
headline: Gap Year Before Entering College
searchDescription: I explored myself in various versions. I became more free. I found peace in music. I found my soul in storytelling.
longDescription: That period gave me room to reset my ambition, reflect more seriously, and understand what kind of life and work I actually wanted to pursue.

title: Chess & Life
headline: FIDE, USCF Chess Player
searchDescription: Growing up, I realized a chess game is just like a long journey of life.
longDescription: Chess trained patience, pattern recognition, and the willingness to make difficult moves with incomplete information. That still shows up in how I build.
